title: Sora Mobari
content:

{{Quote|This is Master Mobari. She led an attack against Ithorian terrorists but she was betrayed by her Padawan. He died in the same explosion that took her sight.|Jedi Knight A'Sharad Hett|<ref name="R58" />}}
'''Sora Mobari''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], while on a mission to stop [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]], Mobari's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Evan-Ott]], betrayed his Master and tried to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her in an explosion. The blast claimed the Padawan's life and gravely injured Mobari, who later died in a [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Holstice/Legends|New Holstice]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|She is dying. We have tried every treatment imaginable, and still she will not recover.|Jedi Knight A'Sharad Hett, on the injured Sora Mobari|<ref name="R58" />}}
[[File:NewHolstice.jpg|thumb|right|Sora Mobari was transported to a medical stationed on New Holstice (pictured), but died from her injuries there.]]
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Sora Mobari was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and selecting<ref name="R58" /> [[Evan-Ott]]<ref name="CSWEEO" /> as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner.<ref name="R58" /> In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Mobari and her student were sent on a mission to<ref name="R58" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]<ref name="CSWESM">{{CSWECite|II|321|Mobari, Sora}}</ref> to lead an attack against [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]]. However, Evan-Ott betrayed Mobari and tried to [[Death/Legends|murder]] her in an explosion. The blast killed Evan-Ott but also grievously injured Mobari, taking her [[Eye/Legends|eyesight]].<ref name="R58" />

The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master was brought to a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenter]] on the planet [[New Holstice/Legends|New Holstice]], where one of the Jedi stationed there, [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]], tried every imaginable treatment to save Mobari's life. However, nothing worked, and Hett was sure that she would not recover. He asked the Jedi Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to ease Mobari's pain during her ordeal, but Skywalker, who had [[Battle of Jabiim|recently lost]] a [[Padawan Pack|great number of fellow Jedi]] on the planet [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]], could not accept another death. The Padawan tried to stabilize Mobari's [[Heart/Legends|heart]] by [[Telekinesis/Legends|using]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] but only succeeded in making her convulse violently. Mobari died soon afterward, and Hett released a [[Memory moth/Legends|memory moth]] that would eternally whisper her name at the [[Jedi monument (New Holstice)|Jedi memorial]] on New Holstice.<ref name="R58" />

==Personality and traits==
Mobari had [[Color/Legends|brown]] eyes and fair skin.<ref name="R58" />

==Equipment==
As a Jedi, Mobari wore light-colored [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]].<ref name="R58" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sora Mobari first appeared in the [[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]], written by [[W. Haden Blackman]] and released on [[December 17]], [[2003]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. In [[2008]], she received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which also gave her Padawan a name and revealed further info about her mission.

*[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] {{1st}}
